/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libhotpants.so -o libhotpants.so CMakeFiles/hotpants.dir/src/globals.c.o CMakeFiles/hotpants.dir/src/allocate.c.o CMakeFiles/hotpants.dir/src/alard.c.o CMakeFiles/hotpants.dir/src/functions.c.o CMakeFiles/hotpants.dir/src/hotpants_wrapper.c.o  -lcfitsio -llapacke -lm -lm -ldl -lopenblas /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
